campaign.title: GLM-5.2 on NScale: Dynamo versus native engine serving
campaign.execution_policy: Sequential same-node runs with GPU cleanliness checks

issues.error: The initial Dynamo frontend recipe did not explicitly match standalone vLLM's GLM automatic-tool and reasoning parsing path.
issues.impact: Forced and automatic tool calls could diverge between the two vLLM variants before comparative evaluation.
issues.fix: Enabled automatic tool choice on the Dynamo frontend and pinned the glm47 tool parser plus glm45 reasoning parser.
issues.verification: Exact-text, forced-tool, and automatic-tool smoke requests pass; the fail-closed BFCL validation set passed 5/5 with zero inference errors.

issues.error: Upstream partial BFCL evaluation could exit zero after malformed or incomplete generation output.
issues.impact: An incomplete BFCL run could have been mistaken for valid benchmark evidence.
issues.fix: Added exact generated/scored population gates, category accounting, inference-error rejection, immutable resume metadata, and independent weighted-score recomputation.
issues.verification: The pinned five-case smoke gate rejects incomplete output and passed 5/5 against every validated serving path; full imports require all 5,217 generated and 5,106 scored IDs.

issues.error: The first Terminal-Bench runner lacked Docker Compose v2, while Harbor emitted infrastructure exceptions but returned a zero process status.
issues.impact: Three infrastructure-invalid trials could have been reported as a passing harness invocation.
issues.fix: Pinned Docker 27.5.1 and Compose 2.33.0, mounted the required runner paths into DinD, and made exceptions, missing rewards, or incomplete task sets fail closed.
issues.verification: The corrected strict validation run completed all three pinned tasks at 3/3 reward with zero exceptions.

issues.error: Harbor 0.17.1 recorded max_output_tokens for accounting but did not forward it on Chat Completions, and its default 900-second task timeout was too short for the published GLM-5.2 settings.
issues.impact: Early calibrations used non-representative output limits or terminated valid long-running tasks as infrastructure failures.
issues.fix: Pinned the published Terminus-2 sampling contract at temperature 1.0, top-p 1.0, 48,000 output tokens, 256K advertised task context, and a 14,400-second task timeout.
issues.verification: The replacement smoke produced terminating turns and the corrected strict three-task run completed in 37 minutes at 3/3 reward with zero exceptions.

issues.error: A long foreground kubectl exec lost its Teleport transport and left an orphaned evaluator process without a valid continuity attestation.
issues.impact: The interrupted partial result was invalid and could not be imported; another disconnect could have wasted a multi-hour full cell.
issues.fix: Moved evaluator ownership to a detached runner-side supervisor with atomic locking and state publication, bounded reconnectable control calls, explicit cancellation, process-group cleanup, and fail-closed postflight attestation.
issues.verification: All 166 campaign tests pass, including disconnect/start-race/cancellation coverage; the replacement full cell crossed the prior failure boundary and has accepted multiple exact batches without a transport retry.

issues.error: The pinned runtime logs a vllm_omni plugin ImportError for supports_xccl while loading plugins.
issues.impact: Startup log noise only: the unused plugin fails to register, while the GLM text model continues initializing.
issues.verification: The same traceback is present in standalone vLLM and Dynamo + vLLM from the identical pinned image; both become ready, pass validation, and show no post-ready serving failure from the plugin.

notes: No benchmark scores are published until the corresponding full run and official evaluator complete.
The BFCL web-search category requires an external SERPAPI_API_KEY; none is available, so the full official BFCL run remains blocked.
